claimText: CUHK's student AI guide establishes ethical principles of accountability, transparency, and acknowledgement for AI tool use. Users are accountable for AI-generated outputs and must fact-check all outputs.

citation.citationTitle: Use of Artificial Intelligence Tools in Teaching, Learning and Assessments - A Guide for Students
citation.publisher: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
